key_finding: Accuracy dissociation found: 5% noise at AC-selective positions drops accuracy 23.5pp more than TC-selective. But text loss dissociation is reversed (AC positions are hubs, not answer-specific). Massive noise/zero gap: 5% noise ≈ 99% zeroing.
evidence_impact: Resolves exp_002 null result as methodological (zeroing too weak). Upgrades spatial structure claim from 'challenged' to 'partially supported'. Full double dissociation still not achieved.
next_planned: Cross-model replication on Llama-3.1-8B, or more surgical noise intervention to test hub vs channel-specific hypothesis
